title: No Peekie Roast Beefie
instructions: Allow the rib roast to stand at room temperature for 1 hour.  Preheat oven to 375 degrees.  Season the meat well with Kosher Salt and fresh ground pepper, rubbing into the surface.  Place meat in roasting pan.  Cook in oven for 1 ½ hour.  Turn off the heat, but do no open the oven door.

Let roast stay in oven for 2 hours and 15 minutes.  Turn oven back on to 325 degrees.  Cook for 30 to 35 minutes.  Internal temp should read about 128 to 130 degrees – this is for medium rare to medium.  Take roast out.  Get drippings from pan for Yorkshire pudding.  Cover roast well with aluminum foil and let rest for 20 minutes.  Carve roast and place on platter with parsley as garnish.  At this point Yorkshire pudding should be done.
